description: My overall experience with Skyvia has been very positive. The platform feels well designed, reliable, and clearly built with real business users in mind. From the beginning, it was easy to get started and understand how everything fits together, which made adoption smooth and stress‑free. Skyvia does a great job of taking a potentially complex process and making it feel manageable and intuitive. I appreciate how stable and consistent it is—once it’s set up, it simply works and doesn’t require constant attention. The interface is clean, navigation is straightforward, and it’s easy to trust that important data is being handled properly. Overall, Skyvia has proven to be a dependable solution that adds real value and confidence to our workflows, and it’s a tool I’m comfortable relying on long term.
author: Krys A.
pros: Skyvia Backup for QuickBooks Online has been an excellent addition to our accounting and data protection workflow. It provides real peace of mind knowing that our financial data is consistently safeguarded without adding complexity to our daily operations. The setup process is straightforward, and once configured, the backups run smoothly in the background with minimal oversight required. The interface is clean and intuitive, making it easy to locate, review, and restore data when needed. What really stands out is the confidence Skyvia brings—whether it’s protecting against accidental deletions, unexpected changes, or general data risk, the solution feels reliable and well thought out. For businesses that depend heavily on QuickBooks Online and want a dependable, hands-off backup solution, Skyvia Backup is a smart and trustworthy choice.
cons: N/A

review_title: Skyvia is the easiest ELT ETL tool to use
description: We've been using Skyvia since 2022 and have experienced only one brief downtime, which lasted less than an hour. The technical team responded immediately, kept us informed, and quickly resolved the issue. Skyvia offers excellent service and reliability. Their representatives, Darina and Dmitry, are a pleasure to work with—very responsive by email and easy to schedule for longer calls.
author: Duy T.
pros: We chose Skyvia over five similar services during a one-month evaluation in 2022. Its ease of use, wide range of data connectors, and flexible subscription options make data integration stress-free. Most of the process is no-code, but Skyvia also supports more complex integrations through its SQL setup. Data transfer speeds are excellent, and we can monitor progress in real time.
cons: The only improvement we'd like to see is adding their notification system to each connector. They currently offer helpful notifications to prevent exceeding subscription limits, but when issues occur, we usually notice them first at the connector level rather than the subscription level.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I’ve had a great experience using Skyvia! Their connectors make integrating with other products unbelievably easy—no complicated setup, no headaches. Everything just works. It’s been a huge time-saver and has made managing data across different tools so much smoother. Highly recommend it to anyone looking for simple, powerful integrations.
cons: I really don't have any at this time. It does what it's supposed to do and it's as simple as that. Thanks

review_title: Do not purchase Skyvia - I have spent a paid month in just setting up my first connector
description: We have data distributed across different data sources. We wanted to specifically integrate data from Zoho into a data lake.
author: Ruchik V.
pros: User interface is neat. Getting around the product is easy. Setting up a pipeline is intuitive Multiple connectors
cons: Everything that the product is meant to do - Improper error messages - Endlessly running tasks - Extremely poor support
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great low code tool for integrating HubSpot and NetSuite
description: Highly recommend because of ease of set up and quick time to launch for their integration tools. The free trial allowed us to test the set up ahead of time
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Simple, low code interface that we were able to use to effectively integrate HubSpot (CRM) with NetSuite (ERP). It was at a lower cost point than other programs and offered more user friendly / drag and drop options to set up the integration.
cons: Limited documentation and training resources at Skyvia, specifically for its integration product line.

description: Very satisfied with overall experience. Good product, good user manuals / instructions and very efficient customer support.
author: Christos M.
pros: Lots of functionalities and options for data integration , queries etc, covering everything that can be asked. Connections with most known services available. All that in a reasonable, flexible pricing model.
cons: Difficult to say. The only think I could think of, is that it is a bit tricky to choose form the available services and options, because some of them are overlapping a bit.

description: Our experience with Skyvia has been really positive. The Connect product seamlessly integrates with PowerBI, enabling us to build powerful dashboards. What we appreciate most is Skyvia's customer-centric approach - they genuinely listen to our special requests and work collaboratively to implement solutions. This flexibility and willingness to accommodate our specific needs makes Skyvia not just a tool, but a true partner in our data management strategy. Highly recommended for SMEs looking for a reliable, flexible, and well-supported data integration solution.
author: Sven R.
pros: We use Skyvia Connect to power our PowerBI dashboards, and it has been an excellent choice. The integration works flawlessly, and the data synchronization is reliable and fast. What truly sets Skyvia apart is their exceptional flexibility when it comes to special requests and custom requirements. Their team is always willing to work with us to find solutions for specific use cases, which is invaluable for our business. The customer support is responsive and knowledgeable, making implementation and ongoing operations smooth and hassle-free.
cons: Honestly, we haven't encountered any significant drawbacks. The only thing that I could mention was the feature set of the first version of their MCP product but given that it was super early stage, I don't think one can complain.

description: It just works and a fair price. That's what I want from a backup solution. Configuration was simple and intuitive.
author: Kyle C. M.
pros: It was easy to connect and configure for Zoho CRM backups. Daily backups have worked without a hitch since we started. No complaints.
cons: Nothing. It was easy to set up and works without any extra effort. No IT or any Zoho changes were needed.

review_title: Skyvia Backup an easy solution to backup Pipedrive CRM data
description: We use Skyvia Backup to have an additional backup of our Pipedrive CRM data, and it has been reliable and simple to manage. The automated backups run smoothly, and the interface makes it easy to browse snapshots, compare changes, and restore individual records when needed. For a small team, the “set it and trust it” approach is exactly what we need. Overall, a straightforward & dependable solution that gives us real peace of mind.
author: Ramin M.
pros: Very quick to set up to backup Pipedrive CRM data Reliable automated backups Granular restore options (even single records) Clean and intuitive interface Good value for money
cons: We initially had an issue moving to the correct paid plan after the trial, but Skyvia support resolved it quickly and professionally.

review_title: Great tool to have with Helpful Support
author: Nick E.
pros: We use this everyday as a vital part of an integration between our website and data base. Easy to use with a number of different integrations available at your fingertips. Assistance was always an email away.
cons: I cannot any issue with Skyvia that I have come across in all the years my organisation has been using it.

author: Stephane P.
pros: Very easy to configure and get going. We used a partner to help, but could easily have learned how to use it and set it up without help. We were just operating on a very tight timeline and decided that buying the expertise would help us achieve our goal. We set up an integration between our Salesforce org and a custom-built on-premise database that is used every day. The integration runs three times per day, on a schedule, and that works wonderfully for us. I only contacted their support team once, so not much of a sample but my experience with the support team was very favorable. They responded quickly and resolved my issue satisfactorily. I have a very specific purpose for using Skyvia, so the number of features in the system is not that significant to me. However I am impressed by the number of connectors they have available.
cons: I don't have much to say about what I dislike. I'm very satisfied with the system. Perhaps the only issue would be the amount of record transfers that are included in the base price of the various product tiers. I understand the need to have flexible pricing, but perhaps the base packages could be expanded to include a larger amount of record transfers before the overage charge occurs.

description: I'm highly impressed with SkyVia's extensive range of functionalities and its user-friendly interface. We're leveraging SkyVia for database integration with Salesforce, and it delivers on every promise, performing at its full potential. The platform effectively handles various data integration use cases and serves as a reliable bridge between multiple database engines and applications. Highly recommended!
author: Payman S.
pros: Ease of use and ability to handle different use cases.
cons: Nothing to dislike...We really like the product!

description: Very good. Quick responses and a great support team.
author: Mandy F.
pros: Very easy to install/connect. Great customer support. Ease of use.
cons: It can't currently access all of our metafields.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Ease of use: Great support team
description: We're up and running and had zero issues.
author: Frank A.
pros: The ease with which we were able to set it up, and the support they offered.
cons: The different time zones was a bit of a challenge.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Miguel S.
pros: Reliability and ease of use for data connection.
cons: Could have friendly no coding experience uses
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Skyvia is an essential tool for our organization. Data must sync to several different locations and Skyvia handles it automatically and with ease. Highly recommended!
author: James W.
pros: Our data resides in Salesforce but it must sync to Google Sheets and Microsoft SQL Server on a daily, even hourly, basis. Skyvia makes that happen with very little intervention from our data management team. Set it an forget it.
cons: It can be challenging to create complicated SQL statements that pull Salesforce data.

description: Everything fine, working effortlessly once it is set. We use it for backup via API
author: Branimir C.
pros: Easy to set up. Good customer support. When we encounter error it is solved quickly. Works in a set-up-and-forget manner.
cons: - basic package should have more GB in quota
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Alex G.
pros: Easy to integrate and cost effective platform
cons: Nothing negative to comment on. We really enjoy the platform.

review_title: Skyvia is a Wonderful Data Mgmt. Alternative for SFDC Users
description: Skyvia is fabulous a fabulous tool to manage your production SFDC data tasks that allows you more freedom than it's alternatives to choose what you want to do with your data, how much of it you need to work with, and what it actually does to your data via tasks. It's an SFDC admin's best friend in my experience and I've recommended it to all of my fellow admins.
author: Emily S.
pros: I love how simple it is to get connected to your SFDC instance and how intuitive it is from there create and run data mgmt. tasks. From the straight-forward mapping, the options of grabbing your data source, and the ability to save and re-use custom data tasks, Skyvia is my go to data mgmt. alternative.
cons: If you're not familiar with how to setup a new task, it can be a little tricky to get it right your first time. But aside from that, no other cons at all that I can think of!

review_title: Seamlessly Transferring HubSpot Data to Power BI
author: Diana M.
pros: The simplicity of using Skyvia is really the most importable and the most favorite thing. The first beta setup took 10 minutes, which is a win-win strategy for us. Setting up the integration with APIs would have taken much more time and specialists involved. Analysts don’t have to use any third-party integration tools for bringing data to Power BI. They just use already preconfigured OData feed for HubSpot and extract all the necessary objects for reporting and analysis, when needed.
cons: Skyvia allows only 1 endpoint under the free plan, which isn’t a problem or a drawback in reality. We’ve switched to the basic level, which offers unlimited endpoints and connectors as we needed to get access to data from various apps and databases in Power BI.

author: Zayats E.
pros: In terms of feedback, I would like to say the Skyvia product is very well thought out and I like it a lot. Also, your web content is well written, it has enough technical detail and you don’t have to be a programmer to understand it. Kudos to whoever has developed the material.
cons: Skyvia is still working on adding new connectors. I'm looking forward to seeing more of my systems in their list of connectors in the future.

review_title: Skyvia helped me with Salesforce sync to SQL database
description: We were going from Salesforce to an existing SQL database. We handled all of our day to day in Salesforce except for commissions, which we calculated and paid from the SQL database. What we needed the sync function to do is to keep both systems up to date so that the records are in sync. Skyvia helped us with no need to write a code.
author: Alina M.
pros: Sync data up-to-date, flexible price and an opportunity to start with a free plan.
cons: The support is great but the speed could be faster. I assume it is because of different time zones.

review_title: Saves me a lot of money
description: I needed to transform my consultancy business into cloud-only. By that, Skyvia let me easily do necessary integrations just having industry knowledge, not programming skills.
author: Stefan J.
pros: Skyvia let me eliminate internal programming costs.
cons: Support can sometimes be a bit faster, but it's great answers that are helping me much.

description: I use Skyvia for backing up data on a daily basis. If necessary, data can be restored just in several clicks. The only feature I'd like to add is the incremental updates, in this case I won't need to buy Professional plan.
author: Lina L.
pros: Skyvia Backup is easy to manage. I like that it is hosted in a secure Azure GRS storage, so I don’t need to worry about data security. The end-user data is always safe.
cons: The price depends on the amount of data you would like to store, so you need to regularly monitor your current status of the storage.

author: Barbara A.
pros: CSR made sure I received the resources I needed of integration implementation. And helped me configure our packages and test as necessary, and I'm so grateful for him.
cons: I am very happy with the product so far.
